ratings.notes: proposed_contextual_controlled<TAB>4<TAB>5<TAB>3<TAB>4<TAB>The response is contextually relevant but could be more natural in tone and less formal to match the persona of a calm village healer. Short note: Good for relevance, needs friendlier language.<|end_of_output|>

baseline_no_context<TAB>2<TAB>3<TAB>4<TAB>5<TAB>The response is contextually neutral and lacks persona consistency with the calm village healer. Short note: Needs to incorporate more of the character's traits.<|end_of_output|>

The response shows concern and a caring attitude, but lacks direct relevance to both context (the feverish child) and dynamic event (player's dizziness). It could be more natural if it included immediate care advice.
